lessons.title: One to Five
lessons.topic: Counting to 5 and sounds of K and L

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What number comes after three?
questions.hint: It's the next number after three.

questions.question_text: Which one is not a number?
questions.hint: It's a feeling, not a number.

questions.question_text: What sound does a dog make?

steps.title: The Kite and the Lions
steps.text: Look! One bright kite flies. Two lions play under it. It is one kite. It is two lions. They are happy!

steps.explanation: We use 'It is' to say what something is.

steps.audio_text: Look over there! I see three little cats playing with one big kite. Oh, and look! There’s a lion watching them.

questions.question: How many lions do you see?

questions.question_text: How many kites are there? (Vocabulary comprehension)
It is a ___ lion. (Grammar question)
What sound does the letter 'L' make? (Phonics question)
True or False: A lion can fly.
What picture shows a 'kite'? (Reading comprehension)

lessons.title: Six to Ten
lessons.topic: Counting to 10 and the sound of M

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: How do many lions sit under the tree?
questions.hint: Count the lions sitting near the big tree.

questions.question_text: What is the color of the largest lion?
questions.hint: Find the lion with shiny golden fur.

questions.question_text: What sound do lions make?
questions.hint: Listen for the loud sound lions are known for.

items.example: How many mouths do you have?

steps.title: Monkeys and Mouths
steps.text: It is morning in the jungle. I see six monkeys swinging in the trees. Look! It is a mouth of a big monkey. There are ten bananas on the ground. How many monkeys? Let's count them.

steps.explanation: Use 'I see' to say what you look at.

steps.audio_text: I see six monkeys playing. One has a big smile and an open mouth!

steps.title: Six to Ten Lesson Review Quiz

questions.question_text: What number comes after six?
How many monkeys did you see in the video?
I see a monkey with a big ___ (Vocabulary question).
True or False: The sound of M is in 'monkey'.
I see ___ monkeys. (Grammar question)

lessons.title: How Many?
lessons.topic: Asking about quantity and sounds of N and O

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What sound does the letter 'N' make?
What animal is hiding under the sea?
questions.hint: It has eight legs and starts with 'O'.

questions.question_text: Can you guess which number comes after nine?
questions.hint: It's the last number in the song.

items.example: How many arms? It is eight.

steps.title: Animal Adventure
steps.text: Look at the sea. It is one octopus. How many monkeys? It is nine. My nose smells the sea. I see a big orange fish!

steps.explanation: Use 'How many' to ask about numbers.

items.sentence: How many apple do you see?
How many book on the table?

steps.audio_text: Look at my table. I see nine oranges and one big octopus with eight arms. What a funny sight!

questions.question: How many oranges are on the table?

questions.question_text: What color is an orange? (Vocabulary question)
How many legs does an octopus have? (Grammar question)
What letter does 'nose' start with? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: 'Nine' is a number.
How many oranges do you see in the picture? (Reading comprehension)

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which number comes after 5?
Which letter is the first letter in the word 'kangaroo'?
questions.hint: It's the first sound you hear when you say 'kangaroo'.

questions.question_text: Which animal can jump very high and starts with 'K'?
questions.hint: This animal has a pouch and hops around!

steps.title: Sam's Playground
steps.text: Hi! I am Sam. I see two slides and five swings. It is fun! I have a red ball. How many swings? Five!

questions.question: How many swings does Sam see?

steps.audio_text: I have two orange books. My sister has four purple books. How many books do we have all together?

questions.question: How many orange books do I have?
What color are my sister's books?

steps.prompt: Say: How many cats do you see?

questions.question_text: Fill in the blank: It ___ seven o'clock. (Grammar question)
Which picture shows a 'kite'? (Vocabulary question)
How many letters are there in the English alphabet?
True or False: The letter 'L' is before 'K' in the alphabet.
What number comes after nine?
